productDisplayName: Rockport Men's Ocean Grove 2 Brown Shoe
description: If you're looking for shoes that say casual, the rockport Ocean Grove 2 screams nonchalance. Engineered with adidas's adiPRENE technology, they are perfect for all-day wear. Relaxed with an easy Fit, they are comfortable and extremely stylish. Add to it the lovely suede laces! Perfect for casual outings, and a must-have in every man's wardrobe.Upper Complete suede upper for durability and style Two-eyelet lace up panel with suede laces Slightly squared toe for added comfort for toes Well padded tongue and collar for in-step cumfort and snug fit Contrast stitch detailing for increased style Strobel construction for added stability and forefoot flexibility Suede loops on the sides for enhanced structure and style Wrap-around suede midfoot overlays for better shoe structure Heel cup with brand badge Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and support adidas adiPRENE footbed for highly shock-absorbent cushioning to protect the heel at impact Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole with non-marking wave pattern grooves Shoe CareUse a suede brush to dust off the dirtUse a suede shoe polish to make the shoes shineDo not store in direct sunlight
